name: Finance
description: Financial data including revenue, expenses, invoicing, and forecasting.
use_cases: Revenue tracking and recognition by period, customer, and product
Invoice management and payment status tracking
Expense categorization and vendor payment management

entity.name: Finance
entity.description: Financial data including revenue, expenses, invoicing, and forecasting.

best_practices: Close books within 5 business days of period end
Tag all expenses with department and category
Maintain audit trail for all financial changes

data_products.description: Revenue and expense forecasts by period.
